title: Naples Boat Rental Tips: Costs, Seasons & Best Boats 2026
html:
Renting a boat in Naples opens up the glittering Bay of Naples and the nearby islands of Capri, Ischia and Procida. Prices for a motorboat start from around EUR 250 for a half-day, and you can compare verified listings on BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace for boat hire. Most departures leave from the port of Mergellina or the larger Molo Beverello in the city centre.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Naples?

Expect to pay between EUR 250 and EUR 5,000 per day depending on boat size and crew. You can boat rental Naples for your chosen dates.

  • A shared group tour from Mergellina costs from EUR 80 per person.
  • A small motorboat (up to 6 guests) for half a day starts around EUR 250.
  • A catamaran for a full day with up to 12 guests costs approximately EUR 1,200.
  • A fully crewed luxury yacht like the Mefasa 90 runs from EUR 4,000 per day.

Where to set off in Naples

The main departure points are the central Molo Beverello pier and the adjacent Port of Mergellina, both served by ferries and private charter boats. For a quieter launch, consider the Marina di Stabia on the Sorrento Peninsula, or sail from the historic Port of Pozzuoli to the west. The islands of Capri and Ischia are the most popular destinations, each about 18 nautical miles from Naples. Procida, smaller and less crowded, is a lovely alternative at roughly 14 nautical miles.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat Best for day trips to Capri; carries up to 6 guests; from EUR 250 half-day.
  2. Sailing yacht Ideal for a relaxed cruise around the Gulf of Naples; 8-10 guests; from EUR 400 half-day.
  3. Catamaran Spacious and stable, perfect for families or groups; up to 12 guests; from EUR 600 half-day.
  4. Luxury motor yacht For VIP experiences, such as the Mefasa 90; up to 12 guests; from EUR 4,000 full day.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Naples?

In Italy, a licence is required for boats over 40 hp, but many rental operators include a skipper with the boat. One option worth a look is the Mefasa 90 listing.

For a hassle-free day on the water, consider hiring a local skipper who knows the best anchorages around Capri and the coast of Sorrento. It can actually work out cheaper than renting without one once you add insurance and fuel costs.

The summer season runs from May to October, with July and August being the busiest and most expensive months. The local Libeccio wind can kick up afternoon chop, so an early start is wise. The operator will confirm exact licence and skipper requirements with you before booking.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 80 to EUR 5,000 per day
  • Peak months: July and August
  • Typical trip length: 4 to 8 hours
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on most boats
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Naples

Can I rent a boat without a skipper in Naples?

Yes, if the boat has an engine under 40 hp and you hold a valid Italian or international licence recognised in Italy, you may rent bareboat.

What is the best time of day to explore the Bay of Naples by boat?

Early morning from 8am to midday offers calm seas and fewer crowds, especially around the islands.

Are there all-inclusive packages for boat rental in Naples?

Many operators offer packages that include fuel, a skipper, and a meal; check individual listings on BoatHire24 for details.

Can I anchor and swim near Capri?

Yes, you can anchor in designated spots such as the Green Grotto and the Faraglioni rocks, but pay attention to protected marine areas.

Whether you plan a self-drive adventure or a crewed luxury charter, start by browsing the options for boat rental Naples on BoatHire24. For a premium experience, take a look at the Mefasa 90 listing to see what a crewed 90-foot yacht can offer. If you own a boat and would like to earn income, consider listing your vessel on boathire24.com and reach thousands of travellers planning their next trip.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Naples or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Naples and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
